pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script generates CSV at this path
export_result.sh checks this path for diagram output
export_result.sh checks this path for PDF output

Curriculum data CSV contains exactly 20 courses: CS101, MATH101, ENG101, CS102, MATH102, PHYS101, CS201, MATH201, CS205, CS202, STAT205, CS300, CS305, CS310, CS315, CS320, CS401, CS405, ETHICS400, CS490

Prerequisite dependencies in CSV total 20 directed edges: CS101->CS102, MATH101->MATH102, MATH101->CS205, CS102->CS201, MATH102->CS201, MATH102->STAT205, CS201->CS202, CS102->CS300, STAT205->CS300, CS102->CS305, CS300->CS310, MATH201->CS310, CS300->CS315, MATH201->CS315, CS305->CS320, CS310->CS401, PHYS101->CS401, CS310->CS405, CS401->CS490, CS405->CS490
All 7 required course codes are present in the curriculum data CSV

Verified prerequisite chain: MATH101->MATH102 (MATH102 has prerequisite MATH101), MATH102->MATH201 (MATH201 has prerequisite MATH102)

privileged_info_summary: The curriculum data is synthetically generated by setup_task.sh and contains 20 courses with 20 prerequisite edges. The minimum node count metadata of 18 is conservative but correct; actual data has 20 nodes. The minimum edge count metadata of 15 is conservative but correct; actual data has 20 edges. All 7 required courses (CS101, CS102, CS300, CS310, CS401, CS405, CS490) are present in the data. All three required prerequisite chains are valid: CS101→CS102→CS201→CS202, MATH101→MATH102→MATH201, and CS300→CS310→CS405. File paths for the input CSV, output diagram, and PDF export are correctly specified.
